properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 95/25
 ISPS SECURITY INFOMATION NORWEGIAN PORTS

 MARITIME SECURITY LEVEL IS RAISED TO LEVEL 2 FROM 091000 UTC JUL 25 IN THE FOLLOWING NORWEGIAN PORT FACILLITIES
 NOAVE-0001 NORSEA LOGISTICS AVEROEY
 NOSLA-0002 NORSEA TANANGER 
 NOSRP-0003 NORSEA LOGISTICS STORDBASE
 NOHFT-0005 NORSEA POLARBASE
 NOSVG-0008 NORSEA DUSAVIK
 NOKSU-0014 NORSEA LOGISTICS VESTBASE

 SHIPS CALLING AT THESE FACILLITIE SHALL RESPOND WITHOUT DELAY TO THIS SCURITY LEVEL.
